description: A composite graphic: a booking/mugshot photo inset is layered over a faded, blue-tinted full-bleed background photograph of a sunny suburban residential street lined with small single-story houses, parked cars (including a Jeep), trees and utility poles under a clear blue sky. The centered inset photo shows a middle-aged man with short dark hair and a full dark beard, wearing a light gray/sage hooded sweatshirt, standing against an interior office wall with a drop-ceiling, doors and a numbered placard ('4') behind him, looking at the camera. No large headline text appears on this image. The tweet states the subject is Magdaleno Roman-Rosales of Mexico, previously convicted of unlawful restraint/kidnapping, removed, and who reentered illegally before being re-arrested.
